use serde::Deserialize;

// GOOD: required fields without defaults, truly optional fields with defaults
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct DatabaseConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    username: String,
    password: String,
    database_name: String,
    #[serde(default = "default_pool_size")]
    pool_size: u32,
}

fn default_pool_size() -> u32 {
    10
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct AuthConfig {
    secret_key: String,
    token_expiry: u64,
    issuer: String,
    #[serde(default = "default_algorithm")]
    algorithm: String,
}

fn default_algorithm() -> String {
    "HS256".to_string()
}
